name: bettercap-caplets
title: bettercap-caplets
description:
Bettercap scripts (caplets) and proxy modules
This package contains Bettercap scripts (caplets) and proxy modules. The
bettercap's interactive sessions can be scripted with .cap files, or caplets.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use bettercap-caplets because Bettercap scripts (caplets) and proxy modules.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use bettercap-caplets as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair bettercap-caplets with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `bettercap-caplets --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
